chunks.title: Yahweh's Victory and the Vineyard
chunks.reason: Describes Yahweh defeating Leviathan and establishing a vineyard of delight for Israel.

chunks.title: Punishment and Atonement Explained
chunks.reason: Explains the nature of Yahweh's discipline against Israel and the resulting atonement through the destruction of idols.

chunks.title: Gathering of the Remnant
chunks.reason: Prophesies the final gathering of Israel from exile and their worship in Jerusalem.
